About Heptari
My GitHub

Embedded Development

Rrecords a wealth of experience, manuals, and standards interpretations related to embedded development.

Algorithms

Describes the interpretation and implementation of some algorithms related to autonomous driving, perception and control, and data structures.

Basic Software and Tools

Getting Started ​

You can get started using VitePress right away using npx!

sh
npm init
npx vitepress init
